title: NotificationDigest
description: A bundled, prioritized, deduplicated set of InboxItems for one delivery window. Provided to Habits (daily ritual), Shopping (impulse signals), Tasks. Enforces the platform notification budget (SC-009): at most 1-2 money pushes/day with a critical breakthrough ceiling. Items are ordered Critical -> Important -> Informational and, within a tier, by the safety precedence hierarchy (ux-foundations §10.4). Inbox is the SOLE owner of the push surface; no other module dispatches a push (ux-foundations §6.3). All monetary values inside items are rendered via @finos/format; Inbox carries but never recomputes them (Clarifications Q3).

digest_id.description: Idempotency key for dispatch. Re-dispatching the same digest_id MUST NOT re-send an acknowledged push or double-count the budget (FR-INB-007).

profile_id.description: Owning household member. Reads are authZ-checked server-side against session identity + MemberScope; never a client-supplied id (Threat Model, SC-015).

window.description: Delivery window. Default cadence is evening-only with morning user-enabled (Clarifications Q1); 'breakthrough' is the immediate critical-bypass dispatch (ux-foundations §6.1).

title_fr.description: Push title, French (e.g. '3 mises à jour financières'). A missing fr title is a bilingual defect.

items.description: Ordered InboxItems: Critical first, then Important, then Informational; within a tier by safety_class precedence (safe_to_act > credit_hard_avoid > budget_headroom > optimization).

dedup_key.description: (module_id, event_type, subject_hash) within a 24h window; identical keys collapse to one item (SC-I-005).

cad_amount.description: Optional; carried from the source alert, rendered via @finos/format, never recomputed/converted by Inbox (Clarifications Q3).

state.description: queued = held to next digest under budget pressure (never dropped); expired = past expires_at; overridden = lost a conflict to a higher safety_class alert (shown 'see safety alert first', ux-foundations §10.4).

overridden_by.description: item_id of the winning (higher-precedence) item when state = overridden.

freshness.description: Relayed from the source alert. A stale-money item is flagged and is NOT pushed (FR-INB-005).

budget_consumed.description: Per-user daily push accounting. Enforces SC-009: money_pushes_today MUST NOT exceed the configured budget (default 2); critical_pushes_today MUST NOT exceed the critical ceiling (default 1).

coalesced_critical_count.description: For a breakthrough window: the number of critical alerts coalesced into this single push ('N urgent money alerts'), per the critical ceiling (Clarifications Q2).

dispatch_state.description: suppressed_by_preference = push withheld per NotificationPreference, but critical safety items remain surfaced in-app and the suppression is audited (FR-INB-006, Clarifications Q5). failed = retried with backoff (FR-X-012); retry is idempotent on digest_id.

audit_ref.description: Append-only audit event id for this dispatch (FR-X-007, FR-INB-008).

freshness.description: Freshness of the digest assembly itself (source = 'derived').
